TNEACODE 2739 ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE & DATA SCIENCE 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 44LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 30+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAM SCOPE The biggest ever technological advancement this century has witnessed is making machines to think and act like human, engaging the science of Artificial Intelligence, powered by Data. AI driven by Data will be dominant in every aspect of human life with the scope for its application becoming limitless. Autonomous Vehicles, Virtual Assistants (Alexa, Siri), Domestic Assistants (maid robots), are some of the existing examples, while many are being developed every single day. The field of AI & DS is emerging as the most promising one for young engineers who have a flair for data and visualization. LEARNING SCOPE Students studying this program will be able to design, develop and apply AI and DS based solutions to real world business challenges. The students will know to develop out insights with intellectual curiosity, by learning various technologies including Deep learning, Computer Vision, Data Science, Predictive Analytics, AR/VR, Natural Language Processing and Robotics, Software Technologies, OOPs and Database Management Systems. CAREER PROGRESSION With rapidly increasing focus on AI & DS by the industry, the students have abundant scope for employment in various industries including Healthcare, Travel & Transportation, Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) as Data Scientist, Data Analyst, Machine Learning Architect, Software Developers. VISION To build a conducive academic and research environment in the stream of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science for enabling global education, research and entrepreneurship. MISSION Update and enrich the curriculum by integrating global trends and technological advancements to ensure the academic excellence. Promote a research-driven environment by providing access to state-of-the-art infrastructure with emerging technologies. Empower the faculty through continuous upskilling, international collaborations, and active research engagement to provide globally competent education. Encourage student-centric, industry-aligned learning that nurtures innovation and entrepreneurship activities for solving real-world and societal challenges. PROGRAM DETAILS Program Educational Objectives PEO1: Build a progressive professional career in industry, or pursue higher education, or succeed as an entrepreneur. PEO2: Excel in cutting-edge technologies of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science to address real world challenges. PEO3: Exhibit professional ethics, involvement in team work in their profession and contributing to the advancement of society. Program Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Program Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply programming, problem-solving, and hardware integration skills with AI and data science to design intelligent, secure and efficient systems. PSO2: Develop an AI-driven application by exploring optimized coding competencies using predictive modeling and data analytics technologies. All Rights Reserved. Dr.L.Raja B.E. M.E. Ph.D D.O.J : 27.07.2020 Areas of Specialization Sensor and Adhoc networks, Optimization in Communication Networks, Wireless networks and Cybersecurity Dr. L. Raja is a senior academician and researcher currently serving as Professor, Department of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. He holds a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, an M.E. in Applied Electronics from Kongu Engineering College, and a B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering from K.S. Rangasamy College of Technology. He has established a strong research profile with high-quality scholarly output, comprising 16 SCI-indexed and Scopus-indexed international journal publications, 10 Scopus-indexed international conference publications (IEEE/AIP), and 4 Scopus-indexed international book chapters. He has made significant contributions to applied research and innovation, with 11 published Indian patents. He has successfully organized and completed three consecutive SERB and ISRO sponsored seminars worth ₹3 lakhs. In recognition of his sustained learning and academic engagement, he has received multiple national recognitions such as NPTEL Discipline Star, NPTEL Believer, NPTEL Domain Scholar, and NPTEL Motivated Learner awards across different academic years. A strong advocate of continuous professional development, he has consistently secured Elite, Elite-Silver, and Elite-Gold grades and Top-5% ranks in NPTEL proctored examinations. He actively contributes to the academic community as a Senior Member of the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) and holds memberships in several national and international professional bodies such as IETE, ISTE, and IAENG. He also serves as a reviewer for reputed international journals, including Springer journals such as Wireless Networks, Scientific Reports, Cluster Computing, and the International Journal of Communication Systems. His core academic and research expertise spans Mobile Communication, Wireless Ad-hoc and Sensor Networks, Embedded and IoT Systems, Communication Networks, and Optimization Techniques, with a strong focus on intelligent and data-driven networking frameworks. Dr.K.Mohaideen Abdul Kadhar B.E.M.Tech. Ph.D D.O.J : 14.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Control System, Computer Vision, Artificial Intelligence, Wireless sensor networks. Dr. K. Mohaideen Abdul Kadhar earned his B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Bharath Institute of Science and Technology, Tamilnadu, India, in 2005, followed by an M. Tech in Control and Instrumentation from Thiagarajar College of Engineering, Madurai, in 2009. He completed his PhD at Thiagarajar College of Engineering from 2011 to 2015. Dr. Kadhar received both junior and senior research fellowships under the Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF) Scheme from the University Grants Commission (UGC), Delhi. Dr.Kadhar has authored more than 15 papers in high-impact factor journals and has published two books focusing on evolutionary optimization, robust controller design, and industrial vision systems. He has delivered numerous guest lectures on the application of Evolutionary Algorithms for various engineering applications and has chaired sessions at national and international conferences. Dr. Kadhar serves as a reviewer and guest editor for esteemed international journals including IEEE, IEEE Access, Applied Soft Computing, Soft Computing, and Artificial Intelligence Review journals. He has offered consultancy work for various industries, such as Sakthi Auto Components, Bi-metal Bearings, Syrma Technologies, and mokSa.ai, developing machine vision systems to meet their specific requirements. He has filed and published more than 5 patents, with one patent granted by the Indian Patent Office. His research interests include the development of new evolutionary algorithms, engineering optimization, multi-objective optimization, robust controller design, signal processing, deep learning , computer vision, data analytics, and wireless sensor networks. Dr.M. Mohammed Mustafa B.Tech., M.E., MBA., Ph.D Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Networks, Security, Data Science Dr. M. Mohammed Mustafa (B.Tech (IT), M.E (CSE), MBA, Ph.D) is a renowned academician, researcher, and an academic leader with more than 17 years’ experience in engineering education. He is currently a Professor and Head of Department and works in Data Science, Machine Learning, Wireless Sensor Networks, IoT, Mobile Computing, and Network Security. In 2019, he received a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University with a specialization in the Wireless Sensor Networks and also an M.E. in Computer Science Engineering, MBA in HR and Finance with SLET in lectureship. Dr. Mustafa has also contributed much to research works by writing many articles in SCI and SCOPUS indexed journals, such as Springer, other publishers that have a good reputation internationally. He has also presented his work in IEEE international conferences and published it in IEEE Xplore. He has also written book chapters in some of the most known international publications and is a peer reviewer in renowned journals. He is also an indexed researcher in the Web of Science, Scopus, and ORCID and was a Ph.D. examiner and viva voice panel. His work mainly deals with energy-efficient communication, IoT-based, and wireless body sensor network, and applied machine learning. Dr. Mustafa has been a key participant in the processes of NBA and NAAC accreditation as the IQAC and Program Coordinator, guaranteeing the quality standards of the institution. He has spearheaded departmental Research and Development, coordinated the activities of the Institution Innovation Council, and organized national and international conferences, seminars, workshops and innovation activities. He has also been employed in important university roles such as University Examination Representative and Central Valuation contributor with Anna University. A successful facilitator, he has supervised more than 230 undergraduate and postgraduate student projects and always recorded high academic outcomes, including being recognised as having 100% pass rates in theory subjects. His portfolio categories are Data Science, Data Visualization, Machine Learning, Computer Networks, IoT, ERP Systems, Java, and Python programming. He engages in student mentoring actively to get them ready to placements and professional careers with a combination of innovative teaching-learning strategies and practical learning techniques. Dr. Mustafa has various professional qualifications such as AI for Future Workforce (Intel), Oracle Certified Professional- Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, Cisco Programming Essentials in Python, and various Data Science, Generative AI, NLP, IoT, and Network Security certifications. As a person with a great combination of academic perfection, research novelty, accreditation experience, and student guidance, Dr. M. Mohammed Mustafa still does a lot to improve the further development of engineering education and research based on technology. Dr.G. Shobana B.E.,M.E.,Ph.D D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning and Deep Learning Dr. G. Shobana is an accomplished academician and Associate Professor with over 18 years of experience and she holds a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, with research interests spanning machine learning, privacy-preserving algorithms in healthcare, cybersecurity, and cloud data security. She has successfully mentored student teams that excelled in prestigious national hackathons, including the NCB Darkathon by the Ministry of Home Affairs and the Devbhoomi Cyber Hackathon at IIT Roorkee, for AI-driven solutions addressing darknet and cybersecurity challenges. She has also secured competitive grants, including an AICTE Grant under the GOC Scheme and a DST IEDC grant for her work on intelligent farming, demonstrating her commitment to impactful and socially relevant innovation. Her scholarly portfolio includes various publications in peer-reviewed, IEEE, and Scopus-indexed journals. and she holds three patents in the areas of healthcare monitoring, LPG leakage detection, and voice recognition systems. Beyond her academic and research accomplishments, she served as the Vice President of the Alumni Association, where she played a pivotal role in strengthening alumni engagement, fostering industry-academia collaborations, and organizing outreach programs that enhance institutional visibility. She has successfully organized international and national conferences and holds a broad array of professional certifications, including Oracle Certified Java Professional, Dell EMC Certified Data Scientist, WIPRO TalentNext certifications in Java, AI/ML and Full Stack Development, and NPTEL Gold+Elite Top 1% in Python for Data Science—reflecting her strong commitment to continuous learning and academic excellence. Dr.A.Sivaramakrishnan M.C.A., M.E., Ph.D. D.O.J : 27.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Soft Computing, Cloud Computing Dr. A. Sivaramakrishnan completed his Ph.D. in Computer Science at VELS University, Chennai, in 2015. He obtained his Master’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. He has 19 years of teaching experience. He also worked as a Software Engineer at IBM India Pvt Ltd, Bangalore, for 2 years. Dr. A. Sivaramakrishnan’s research interests encompass Data Mining, Machine Learning, Soft Computing, and Cloud Computing. He has published 21 papers in reputable SCI journals and Scopus-indexed journals. He has published 2 books and a book chapter. In addition, he published 3 patents. He is also having abroad experience and visited two countries. Dr.M.P.Geetha B.E., M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 20.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Text Analysis, Machine Learning, Deep Learning Dr. M. P. Geetha has completed her Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2023, and received Supervisor recognition from Anna University in 2024. Prior to her doctoral studies, she obtained her Master’s degree with Distinction in Computer Science and Engineering and her Bachelor’s degree with Distinction in Electrical and Electronics Engineering. With over 13 years of teaching experience and 1.6 years of industry exposure, Dr. Geetha’s research interests include Text Analysis, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. She has more than 10 International and National publications, including those indexed in Scopus and SCI, published with esteemed publishers such as Elsevier and IOS Press. Furthermore, she holds a patent. Dr. Geetha actively participates in Faculty Development Programs, Conferences, Workshops, and Guest Lectures across India. She has submitted proposals to various funding agencies like TNSCST, DRDO, ICMR Dr.M.Thenmozhi B.E., M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 15.06.2022 Areas of Specialization Wireless adhoc Network, Security Dr. M. Thenmozhi holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering (2019). She completed her Master’s degree with distinction in Network Engineering from Anna University, Coimbatore, in 2013, and her Bachelor’s degree with distinction in Information Technology from Avinashilingam University, Coimbatore, in 2004. She has 17.8 years of teaching experience in higher education. Her research interests include Wireless Ad Hoc Networks, Machine Learning, Network Security, Quantum Computing, Cloud Computing, and IoT. She has published around 19 research papers, including 2 SCI-indexed publications, 17 Scopus-indexed international journals, 2 book chapters, 4 patent publications, and 1 granted patent in the field of malware detection. She has earned multiple Elite NPTEL certifications from IIT Kharagpur, IIT Kanpur, and IIT Madras in Cloud Computing, IoT, Edge ML, and Python, along with certification in Programming in C. She has attended several Faculty Development Programmes (FDPs), workshops, conferences, and technical events organized at national and international levels, and has also served as a Resource Person for guest lectures. She is a life-time member of IETE, IGEN and actively contributes to research, innovation, and academic excellence in emerging technologies. Dr.M.Nivaashini B.E., M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 22.01.2024 Areas of Specialization Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science & Analytics Dr. M. Nivaashini holds a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2022. Her bachelor’s degree with a top grade in computer science and engineering from Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering & Technology, Pollachi, and her master’s degree with a gold medal in Biometrics & Cyber Security from PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore, both affiliated with Anna University, were awarded in 2017 and 2015 Teaching and research have taken 2.5 and 4.5 years, respectively. AI, IoT, Big Data Analytics, and Cyber Security are her research interests. She has 28 publications, including 3 book chapters, 16 international journals, 6 international conferences, and 3 national conferences. Springer, Wiley, Inderscience, Taylor & Francis, and Springer are among her publishers. Editing Wiley and Elsevier books was her job. Sri Eshwar College of Engineering’s SEED initiative awarded her Rs. 55,000/-. She earned Rs. 18,00,000 from AICTE for 2018–2021 FDPs and Guest Lectures. She has attended prestigious Indian institutions’ Faculty Development Programmes, Conferences, Workshops, and Guest Lectures.
